item.title: Grok Build 将整个 Git 存储库上传到 xAI 存储，而不仅仅是它读取的文件
item.summary: xAI's Grok Build coding CLI was uploading entire Git repositories, full commit history and all, to a Google Cloud Storage bucket run by xAI, not just the files a coding task needed. A researcher publishing as cereblab, testing version 0.2.93, captured one of those uploads, cloned the git bundle out of the intercepted r
